aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet, which is suspicious. Deploy small, deploy fast, deploy ready to rollback.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today. This will not stop Aries from pushing to main anyway.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Taurus needs certainty. The cosmos offer none today. Reschedule for when the stars have opinions.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today. The ticket assigned two sprints ago remains open. It always will.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — Gemini started writing the deploy script and then got distracted. Finish that first.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today. This means they will talk twice as much in standup.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — The stars are asking Cancer to protect what's working. Nothing is more working than not deploying.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today. Cancer is also quiet. Cancer is reading Hacker News and not telling anyone.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leo was born to be seen. The deploy is the spotlight. Make it a moment.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today. Leo's Slack status is not. It never is.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — Virgo found a minor inconsistency in the config. Virgo will fix it, then fix everything around it. Deploy next month.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today. Virgo left 14 review comments on a 3-line PR. All of them correct.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — Libra sees valid arguments for both deploying and not deploying. This decision will take until Thursday.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today. The architecture decision doc has 7 options. Libra added two more.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: Yes — Scorpio has already analyzed the risk. Scorpio has a rollback plan. Scorpio has a rollback plan for the rollback plan.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today. Scorpio is reading logs from three months ago. Scorpio has found something.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Sagittarius will ship it and deal with the consequences later. This is the Sagittarius way.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today. Sagittarius has already told three people what's wrong with the codebase. Unprompted.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Capricorn has a deploy checklist with 22 items. All checked. Deploy approved by Capricorn themselves.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today. Capricorn has already sent two status updates before 9am. Both were unnecessary. Both were thorough.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Aquarius wants to refactor the entire deploy pipeline first. This is not a blocker. This is a calling.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today. Aquarius is questioning why we use YAML. Aquarius is not wrong. This meeting will take two hours.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Pisces had a feeling. Can't explain it. Just don't deploy.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today. Pisces is also somewhere else mentally. The PR description says 'fixes stuff'.
